message:
test(notifications): rate_limited_sender_with_cx_forwards_to_inner (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds test coverage for the tick 35 fix. Pins that
`RateLimitedSender::send_with_cx` both:

  1. Runs the rate-limit check (immediate second send returns
     rate_limited=true without reaching the inner sender).
  2. Forwards cx through to `inner.send_with_cx(cx, payload)` on the
     non-rate-limited path (MockSender records exactly one message).

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/notifications.rs (+43 tests)

   New test `rate_limited_sender_with_cx_forwards_to_inner` under
   the existing rate-limited-sender test mod. Mirrors the shape of
   `rate_limited_sender_allows_after_interval` but uses the Cx-first
   `send_with_cx` entry point and asserts both behaviors:

     * d1 (first send): success, not rate-limited
     * d2 (immediate second): rate_limited, not success
     * sent.lock().len() == 1 — rate-limited send did NOT forward to
       inner, confirming the within_window guard runs before the
       `self.inner.send_with_cx(cx, payload)` call

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib notifications::: 47/47 pass
    (46 existing + 1 new Cx-first)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
